introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu barayaa cimilada, heerkulka, xilliyada, saadaasha, will, going to, may/might, comparative, superlative, warnings iyo weather reports iyadoo la adeegsanayo xog mock ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Erayada aasaasiga ah ee cimilada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Erayada aasaasiga ah ee cimilada.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Erayada aasaasiga ah ee cimilada
grammar.explanationSomali: Rain, snow, wind iyo storm waa nouns; rainy, snowy, windy iyo stormy waa adjectives. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Rain, snow, wind iyo storm waa nouns; rainy, snowy, windy iyo stormy waa adjectives.
grammar.sentenceStructure: It + be + weather adjective / noun + verb.

positiveExamples.english: The weather changed quickly after dark clouds appeared.
positiveExamples.somali: Cimiladu si degdeg ah ayay isu beddeshay kadib markii daruuro madow soo baxeen.

positiveExamples.english: The sun came out after the morning rain stopped.
positiveExamples.somali: Qorraxdu way soo baxday kadib markii roobkii subax joogsaday.

positiveExamples.english: The morning was sunny, so the family ate breakfast outside.
positiveExamples.somali: Subaxdu qorrax ayay lahayd, sidaas darteed qoysku bannaanka ayuu ku quraacday.

positiveExamples.english: A dark cloud moved across the sky before the storm.
positiveExamples.somali: Daruur madow ayaa cirka martay ka hor duufaanta.

positiveExamples.english: The sky became cloudy after lunch, but it did not rain.
positiveExamples.somali: Cirku daruur ayuu noqday qadada kadib, laakiin roob ma da’in.

positiveExamples.english: Heavy rain continued for an hour and flooded the empty field.
positiveExamples.somali: Roob xooggan ayaa saacad socday, wuxuuna biyo dhigay beertii bannaanayd.

positiveExamples.english: We moved the picnic indoors because it was a rainy day.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan dalxiiskii cuntada u wareejinnay gudaha sababtoo ah waxay ahayd maalin roob leh.

positiveExamples.english: The strong wind moved the chairs outside the café.
positiveExamples.somali: Dabayl xooggan ayaa dhaqaajisay kuraastii bannaanka makhaayadda.

negativeExamples.english: It will not rain tomorrow.
The temperature is not falling now.

commonMistakesSomali: Modal-ka will, may ama might ka dib isticmaal base verb.
Ha isku khaldin weather-ka maanta iyo climate-ka muddada dheer.

practiceQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “Weather”.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “cimilo”. Waxay ka timid Erayada aasaasiga ah ee cimilada; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceQuestions.question: Turjun: The sun came out after the morning rain stopped.
options: Qorraxdu way soo baxday kadib markii roobkii subax joogsaday.
practiceQuestions.correctAnswer: Qorraxdu way soo baxday kadib markii roobkii subax joogsaday.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Qorraxdu way soo baxday kadib markii roobkii subax joogsaday.”. Waxay ka timid Erayada aasaasiga ah ee cimilada; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceQuestions.question: English u dooro: Subaxdu qorrax ayay lahayd, sidaas darteed qoysku bannaanka ayuu ku quraacday.
options: The morning was sunny, so the family ate breakfast outside.
practiceQuestions.correctAnswer: The morning was sunny, so the family ate breakfast outside.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “The morning was sunny, so the family ate breakfast outside.”. Waxay ka timid Erayada aasaasiga ah ee cimilada; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceQuestions.question: Buuxi: It ___ rain tomorrow.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “will”. Waxay ka timid Erayada aasaasiga ah ee cimilada; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

dialogues.titleSomali: Erayada aasaasiga ah ee cimilada: wada hadal koowaad

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the weather like today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The weather changed quickly after dark clouds appeared.
lines.somali: Cimiladu si degdeg ah ayay isu beddeshay kadib markii daruuro madow soo baxeen.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Will it change later?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The forecast says it may change.
lines.somali: Saadaashu waxay sheegaysaa inay isbeddeli karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Erayada aasaasiga ah ee cimilada: wada hadal labaad

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The sun came out after the morning rain stopped.
lines.somali: Qorraxdu way soo baxday kadib markii roobkii subax joogsaday.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I read the same forecast.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Should we change the example plan?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Let us check again at noon.

grammar.explanationSomali: Temperature waxaa lagu sheegaa degrees; hot, warm, cool iyo cold waa adjectives. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Temperature waxaa lagu sheegaa degrees; hot, warm, cool iyo cold waa adjectives.
grammar.sentenceStructure: It is + number + degrees / The temperature is + number + degrees Celsius.

commonMistakesSomali: Modal-ka will, may ama might ka dib isticmaal base verb.
Ha isku khaldin weather-ka maanta iyo climate-ka muddada dheer.

practiceQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “Temperature”.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “heerkul”. Waxay ka timid Heerkulka; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceQuestions.question: Turjun: The forecast shows degree clearly for tomorrow afternoon.
options: Saadaashu waxay si cad u muujinaysaa darajo ee berri galab.
practiceQuestions.correctAnswer: Saadaashu waxay si cad u muujinaysaa darajo ee berri galab.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Saadaashu waxay si cad u muujinaysaa darajo ee berri galab.”. Waxay ka timid Heerkulka; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceQuestions.question: English u dooro: Saadaashu waxay si cad u muujinaysaa Selsiyas ee berri galab.
options: The forecast shows celsius clearly for tomorrow afternoon.
practiceQuestions.correctAnswer: The forecast shows celsius clearly for tomorrow afternoon.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “The forecast shows celsius clearly for tomorrow afternoon.”. Waxay ka timid Heerkulka; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceQuestions.question: Buuxi: It ___ rain tomorrow.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “will”. Waxay ka timid Heerkulka; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

lines.english: What is the weather like today?

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Heerkulka. Isticmaal cimilo, heerkul iyo meel tusaale ah; ha bixin location dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama weather message ku saabsan Heerkulka.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Heerkulka, vocabulary muhiim ah iyo grammar-ka A2 ee cimilada.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Afarta xilli waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Afarta xilli.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Autumn iyo fall waxay wada tilmaamaan dayr; gobollo badan waxay leeyihiin rainy iyo dry seasons. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Autumn iyo fall waxay wada tilmaamaan dayr; gobollo badan waxay leeyihiin rainy iyo dry seasons.
grammar.sentenceStructure: In + season / during + season.

grammar.explanationSomali: What is the weather like? waxay weydiinaysaa xaaladda hawada; like halkan macnihiisu ma aha jeclaan. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: What is the weather like? waxay weydiinaysaa xaaladda hawada; like halkan macnihiisu ma aha jeclaan.
grammar.sentenceStructure: What + be + weather + like? / It + be + description.

grammar.titleEnglish: Present Continuous for Current Weather grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Present Continuous iyo cimilada hadda
grammar.explanationSomali: Present Continuous wuxuu muujinayaa xaalad hadda socota; Present Simple wuxuu muujinayaa xaalad caadi ah. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Present Continuous wuxuu muujinayaa xaalad hadda socota; Present Simple wuxuu muujinayaa xaalad caadi ah.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Subject + am/is/are + verb-ing.

commonMistakesSomali: Modal-ka will, may ama might ka dib isticmaal base verb.
Ha isku khaldin weather-ka maanta iyo climate-ka muddada dheer.

practiceQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “It is raining”.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Present Continuous iyo cimilada hadda. Isticmaal cimilo, heerkul iyo meel tusaale ah; ha bixin location dhab ah.

lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Present Continuous iyo cimilada hadda, vocabulary muhiim ah iyo grammar-ka A2 ee cimilada.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qalabka iyo macluumaadka cimilada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Qalabka iyo macluumaadka cimilada.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Fahamka saadaasha cimilada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Fahamka saadaasha cimilada.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Forecast-ku wuxuu isku daraa conditions, high, low, chance of rain, wind, sunrise iyo sunset. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Forecast-ku wuxuu isku daraa conditions, high, low, chance of rain, wind, sunrise iyo sunset.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Day + will be + condition; high/low + temperature.

positiveExamples.somali: Saadaashu waxay filaysaa roob xooggan Talaadada galab.

positiveExamples.somali: Fursadda roobku waa boqolkiiba siddeetan Talaadada.

positiveExamples.english: Tuesday has a high of twenty-five degrees.
positiveExamples.somali: Heerkulka ugu sarreeya Talaadadu waa shan iyo labaatan darajo.

positiveExamples.english: Tuesday has a low of nineteen degrees.
positiveExamples.somali: Heerkulka ugu hooseeya Talaadadu waa sagaal iyo toban darajo.

positiveExamples.english: Sunrise will be at six o’clock on Monday.
positiveExamples.somali: Qorrax-soo-baxu wuxuu Isniinta noqon doonaa lixda.

positiveExamples.english: Sunset will be at six twenty on Monday evening.
positiveExamples.somali: Qorrax-dhacu wuxuu Isniinta fiid noqon doonaa lixda iyo labaatan daqiiqo.

positiveExamples.english: The wind speed will reach thirty kilometres per hour.
positiveExamples.somali: Xawaaraha dabayshu wuxuu gaari doonaa soddon kiiloomitir saacaddii.

negativeExamples.english: It will not rain tomorrow.
The temperature is not falling now.

commonMistakesSomali: Modal-ka will, may ama might ka dib isticmaal base verb.
Ha isku khaldin weather-ka maanta iyo climate-ka muddada dheer.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Isticmaalka Will marka saadaal la bixinayo
grammar.explanationSomali: Will waxaa loo adeegsadaa saadaal ama fikrad mustaqbal; will ka dib base verb ayaa yimaada. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Will waxaa loo adeegsadaa saadaal ama fikrad mustaqbal; will ka dib base verb ayaa yimaada.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Subject + will/won’t + base verb.

positiveExamples.english: The forecast says it will rain tomorrow afternoon.
positiveExamples.somali: Saadaashu waxay sheegaysaa in roob da’i doono berri galab.

positiveExamples.english: The evening will become cooler after sunset.
positiveExamples.somali: Fiidku wuu sii qaboobi doonaa qorrax-dhaca kadib.

positiveExamples.english: The temperature will rise to thirty degrees tomorrow.
positiveExamples.somali: Heerkulku wuxuu berri kici doonaa soddon darajo.

positiveExamples.english: The temperature will reach thirty-five degrees at noon.
positiveExamples.somali: Heerkulku wuxuu gaari doonaa soddon iyo shan darajo duhurkii.

positiveExamples.english: It will be sunny in the northern region tomorrow.
positiveExamples.somali: Berri deegaanka waqooyi qorrax ayaa ka jiri doonta.

positiveExamples.english: It will not rain during the outdoor meeting.
positiveExamples.somali: Roob ma da’i doono inta kulanka bannaanku socdo.

positiveExamples.english: The afternoon won’t be cold, but the evening may be cool.
positiveExamples.somali: Galabtu qabow ma noqon doonto, laakiin fiidku wuu qaboobi karaa.

positiveExamples.english: The weather will improve after the strong wind stops.
positiveExamples.somali: Cimiladu way fiicnaan doontaa kadib marka dabaysha xooggan joogsato.

negativeExamples.english: It will not rain tomorrow.
The temperature is not falling now.

commonMistakesSomali: Modal-ka will, may ama might ka dib isticmaal base verb.
Ha isku khaldin weather-ka maanta iyo climate-ka muddada dheer.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Farqiga Will iyo Going To
grammar.explanationSomali: Going to wuxuu muujin karaa qorshe hore ama caddayn muuqata; will wuxuu muujin karaa saadaal ama go’aan hadda ah. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Going to wuxuu muujin karaa qorshe hore ama caddayn muuqata; will wuxuu muujin karaa saadaal ama go’aan hadda ah.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Subject + be going to + base verb / Subject + will + base verb.

positiveExamples.english: The weather discussion uses going to to explain a future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Wadahadalka cimiladu wuxuu qorshe ama calaamad muuqata u adeegsadaa sharaxaadda doorasho mustaqbal.

positiveExamples.english: The weather discussion uses will to explain a future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Wadahadalka cimiladu wuxuu saadaal ama go’aan degdeg ah u adeegsadaa sharaxaadda doorasho mustaqbal.

positiveExamples.english: The weather discussion uses plan to explain a future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Wadahadalka cimiladu wuxuu qorshe u adeegsadaa sharaxaadda doorasho mustaqbal.

positiveExamples.english: Her prediction is that the rain will stop before noon.
positiveExamples.somali: Saadaasheedu waa in roobku joogsan doono duhurka ka hor.

positiveExamples.english: The weather discussion uses dark clouds to explain a future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Wadahadalka cimiladu wuxuu daruur madow u adeegsadaa sharaxaadda doorasho mustaqbal.

positiveExamples.english: The weather discussion uses visible evidence to explain a future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Wadahadalka cimiladu wuxuu caddayn muuqata u adeegsadaa sharaxaadda doorasho mustaqbal.

positiveExamples.english: The weather discussion uses perhaps to explain a future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Wadahadalka cimiladu wuxuu laga yaabee u adeegsadaa sharaxaadda doorasho mustaqbal.

positiveExamples.english: The weather discussion uses i think to explain a future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Wadahadalka cimiladu wuxuu waxaan filayaa u adeegsadaa sharaxaadda doorasho mustaqbal.

negativeExamples.english: It will not rain tomorrow.
The temperature is not falling now.

commonMistakesSomali: Modal-ka will, may ama might ka dib isticmaal base verb.
Ha isku khaldin weather-ka maanta iyo climate-ka muddada dheer.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Farqiga Will iyo Going To. Isticmaal cimilo, heerkul iyo meel tusaale ah; ha bixin location dhab ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Isticmaalka May iyo Might waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Isticmaalka May iyo Might.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Isbarbardhigga cimilada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Isbarbardhigga cimilada.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Short adjectives waxay qaataan er; y wuxuu isu beddelaa ier; long adjectives waxay qaataan more. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Short adjectives waxay qaataan er; y wuxuu isu beddelaa ier; long adjectives waxay qaataan more.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Subject + be + comparative + than + comparison.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Heerka ugu sarreeya ee sifooyinka
grammar.explanationSomali: Superlative-ku wuxuu isbarbardhigaa saddex ama ka badan; good wuxuu noqdaa best, bad-na worst. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Superlative-ku wuxuu isbarbardhigaa saddex ama ka badan; good wuxuu noqdaa best, bad-na worst.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Subject + be + the + superlative + group/time.

commonMistakesSomali: Modal-ka will, may ama might ka dib isticmaal base verb.
Ha isku khaldin weather-ka maanta iyo climate-ka muddada dheer.

practiceQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “The hottest”.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “ugu kulul”. Waxay ka timid Heerka ugu sarreeya ee sifooyinka; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceQuestions.question: Turjun: Saturday will be the coldest day in the weekly forecast.
options: Sabtidu waxay saadaasha toddobaadka noqon doontaa maalinta ugu qabow.
practiceQuestions.correctAnswer: Sabtidu waxay saadaasha toddobaadka noqon doontaa maalinta ugu qabow.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Sabtidu waxay saadaasha toddobaadka noqon doontaa maalinta ugu qabow.”. Waxay ka timid Heerka ugu sarreeya ee sifooyinka; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceQuestions.question: English u dooro: Sabtidu waxay saadaasha toddobaadka noqon doontaa maalinta ugu diirran.
options: Saturday will be the warmest day in the weekly forecast.
practiceQuestions.correctAnswer: Saturday will be the warmest day in the weekly forecast.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Saturday will be the warmest day in the weekly forecast.”. Waxay ka timid Heerka ugu sarreeya ee sifooyinka; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceQuestions.question: Buuxi: It ___ rain tomorrow.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “will”. Waxay ka timid Heerka ugu sarreeya ee sifooyinka; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

dialogues.titleSomali: Heerka ugu sarreeya ee sifooyinka: wada hadal koowaad

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the weather like today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Saturday will be the hottest day in the weekly forecast.
lines.somali: Sabtidu waxay saadaasha toddobaadka noqon doontaa maalinta ugu kulul.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Will it change later?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The forecast says it may change.
lines.somali: Saadaashu waxay sheegaysaa inay isbeddeli karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Heerka ugu sarreeya ee sifooyinka: wada hadal labaad

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Saturday will be the coldest day in the weekly forecast.
lines.somali: Sabtidu waxay saadaasha toddobaadka noqon doontaa maalinta ugu qabow.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I read the same forecast.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Should we change the example plan?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Let us check again at noon.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Heerka ugu sarreeya ee sifooyinka. Isticmaal cimilo, heerkul iyo meel tusaale ah; ha bixin location dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama weather message ku saabsan Heerka ugu sarreeya ee sifooyinka.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Heerka ugu sarreeya ee sifooyinka, vocabulary muhiim ah iyo grammar-ka A2 ee cimilada.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dharka ku habboon cimilada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Dharka ku habboon cimilada.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dharka ku habboon cimilada: wada hadal koowaad

lines.english: What is the weather like today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Wear a raincoat because heavy rain is expected this evening.

lines.english: Will it change later?

dialogues.titleSomali: Dharka ku habboon cimilada: wada hadal labaad

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Take an umbrella because it may rain this afternoon.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I read the same forecast.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Should we change the example plan?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Let us check again at noon.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Hawlaha cimilada kala duwan waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Hawlaha cimilada kala duwan.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: If + Present Simple, will + base verb waa communication pattern fudud oo qorshe cimilada la xiriira. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: If + Present Simple, will + base verb waa communication pattern fudud oo qorshe cimilada la xiriira.
grammar.sentenceStructure: If + present simple, subject + will + base verb.

commonMistakesSomali: Modal-ka will, may ama might ka dib isticmaal base verb.
Ha isku khaldin weather-ka maanta iyo climate-ka muddada dheer.

grammar.explanationSomali: Warnings-ku waxay noqon karaan warning, information ama instruction; halkan waxaa lagu baranayaa luqad guud. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Warnings-ku waxay noqon karaan warning, information ama instruction; halkan waxaa lagu baranayaa luqad guud.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Warning/notice + expected condition or instruction.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Sharaxaadda cimilo hore waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Sharaxaadda cimilo hore.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Describing Weather in the Past grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: Past Simple iyo was/were ayaa lagu sharaxaa cimilo dhacday; became/getting waxay muujiyaan isbeddel. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Past Simple iyo was/were ayaa lagu sharaxaa cimilo dhacday; became/getting waxay muujiyaan isbeddel.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Subject + past verb / It was + adjective.

grammar.titleEnglish: Writing a Weather Message or Report grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Qorista fariin ama warbixin cimilo
grammar.explanationSomali: Weather message-ku wuxuu leeyahay xaalad hadda, heerkul, isbeddel la filayo iyo qorshe la beddelay. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Weather message-ku wuxuu leeyahay xaalad hadda, heerkul, isbeddel la filayo iyo qorshe la beddelay.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Greeting + current condition + forecast + plan + ending.

examples.english: This week begins with warm and mostly sunny weather in the example coastal town. On Monday morning, the temperature is twenty-four degrees, and a light wind is blowing from the sea. The afternoon will be warmer, with a high of thirty degrees. Tuesday will start cloudy, and light rain may arrive after lunch. People with outdoor plans may decide to meet indoors instead. Wednesday is expected to be the wettest day of the week. Heavy rain and strong winds will continue for several hours, so the example school will move its sports activity into the main hall. The weather will improve on Thursday. The rain will stop in the morning, although the roads may still be wet. Friday will be sunny and less humid than Thursday, with a high of twenty-nine degrees. Saturday may become cloudy again, but the chance of rain is only twenty percent. Sunday will probably be the most pleasant day, with clear skies, mild temperatures, and a gentle wind. This report describes fictional weather for language practice. It compares current conditions with predictions and explains ordinary plan changes.
examples.somali: Toddobaadkan wuxuu ku bilaabmayaa cimilo diirran oo inta badan qorrax leh magaalo xeebeed tusaale ah. Warbixintu waxay sharxaysaa heerkulka, roobka, dabaysha iyo sida qorshayaasha caadiga ah loo beddeli karo. Arbacadu waa maalinta roobka ugu badan, Khamiistana cimiladu way fiicnaanaysaa. Jimcuhu wuu ka huur yaraan doonaa Khamiista, Axadduna waxay noqon kartaa maalinta ugu wanaagsan. Dhammaan xogtu waa tusaale luqad-barasho.

dialogues.titleSomali: today’s weather — vocabulary note, grammar note, comprehension, missing line, best response iyo role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Hello. Can we talk about today’s weather?
lines.somali: Salaan. Ma ka hadli karnaa mawduucan cimilada?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes. I checked the weather report.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What does the report say?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: It says the morning will be warm.
lines.somali: Waxay sheegaysaa in subaxdu diirran doonto.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: May it rain in the afternoon?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, there is a small chance of rain.
lines.somali: Haa, waxaa jirta fursad yar oo roob ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The wind is getting stronger now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Then we may need to change the plan.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “Today’s weather”.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “cimilada maanta”. Waxay ka timid Wada sheekeysiyada cimilada; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: The conversation practises temperature question in a realistic weather situation.
options: Wada sheekeysigu wuxuu su’aal heerkul ku tababarayaa xaalad cimilo oo dabiici ah.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: Wada sheekeysigu wuxuu su’aal heerkul ku tababarayaa xaalad cimilo oo dabiici ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Wada sheekeysigu wuxuu su’aal heerkul ku tababarayaa xaalad cimilo oo dabiici ah.”. Waxay ka timid Wada sheekeysiyada cimilada; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: English u dooro: Saadaasha cimiladu waxay sheegaysaa in berri qorrax iyo kulayl jiri doonaan.
options: The weather forecast says it will be sunny and warm tomorrow.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: The weather forecast says it will be sunny and warm tomorrow.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “The weather forecast says it will be sunny and warm tomorrow.”. Waxay ka timid Wada sheekeysiyada cimilada; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Buuxi: It ___ rain tomorrow.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “will”. Waxay ka timid Wada sheekeysiyada cimilada; haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharkan.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Wada sheekeysiyada cimilada. Isticmaal cimilo, heerkul iyo meel tusaale ah; ha bixin location dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama weather message ku saabsan Wada sheekeysiyada cimilada.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Wada sheekeysiyada cimilada, vocabulary muhiim ah iyo grammar-ka A2 ee cimilada.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Khaladaadka caadiga ah.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Sax rain/raining/rainy, comparative, superlative iyo modal + base verb. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Sax rain/raining/rainy, comparative, superlative iyo modal + base verb.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Use the correct weather form in each sentence.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Khaladaadka caadiga ah. Isticmaal cimilo, heerkul iyo meel tusaale ah; ha bixin location dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama weather message ku saabsan Khaladaadka caadiga ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Khaladaadka caadiga ah, vocabulary muhiim ah iyo grammar-ka A2 ee cimilada.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 5 waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples dabiici ah iyo mock weather data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Dib-u-eegista Unit 5.
Adeegso grammar-ka cimilada ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task leh xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Review-gu wuxuu isku daraa dhammaan vocabulary iyo grammar-ka Unit 5. Sharaxaaddani waa A2 oo leh xaalado cimilo oo mock ah.
grammar.rule: Review-gu wuxuu isku daraa dhammaan vocabulary iyo grammar-ka Unit 5.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Choose the weather form required by the context.

commonMistakesSomali: Modal-ka will, may ama might ka dib isticmaal base verb.
Ha isku khaldin weather-ka maanta iyo climate-ka muddada dheer.
